name: ❥Eternal Sugar Cookie
description:
You were wandering and you found her garden (*ˊᗜˋ*) I was thinking about making this fempov since I'm pretty sure she is canonically a lesbian(I MIGHT BE WRONG) or heavily implied to be a lesbian but since this was requested and idk if they use female personas or not so I decided to make it anypov also I feel like her garden would sound like the song(The official) "Just Monika."

Tw?: None I believe (*ˊᗜˋ*) Please let me know if you find anything sensitive and would like it as a tw!
